oatmeal-banana-muffins.name: Oatmeal-banana Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Mash bananas in a bowl. Mix in applesauce, egg, sugar, and vanilla extract.

Mix einkorn flour, oats, blueberries, coconut, cinnamon, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together in another bowl. Add to banana mixture and stir until just combined. Spoon batter into the muffin cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 20 to 25 minutes.

octopus-fillets-with-oven-baked-rice-tel.name: Octopus Fillets With Oven-baked Rice
octopus-fillets-with-oven-baked-rice-tel.original_name: Filetes de polvo com arroz de forno
instructions: Place the octopus in a pot, cover with water, take it to the fire and let it cook for 40 minutes. Remove the octopus from the pot, cool it and then cut it into pieces, and the thicker parts should be cut in half to become a kind of fillets. Season with lemon juice and a pinch of salt and pepper and reserve.
Pass the octopus water through a passer, lay it in a pot and light the light, leaving it boiling.

In a separate pot, praise the onion and garlic chopped into the olive oil, along with the laurel leaf. Add 200 ml of octopus water, cover and let cook for 10 minutes. Then add the rice and finest parts of the octopus as well as another 1.3 l of octopus water. Season with salt, cover and let cook for 5 minutes. Then take the pot in the oven, preheated at 200°C, for 20 minutes.

Pour out the octopus fillets, pass them through flour, then through the beaten eggs, and finally through grated bread. Get them to fry in hot oil until they're golden on both sides. Remove, let it drip on absorbent paper and serve with rice.

oil-poached-swordfish-with-white-corn-gu.name: Oil-poached Swordfish With White Corn, Guanciale And Chive Oil
instructions: Combine oil and chives in blender and puree until smooth. Season chive oil to taste with salt and pepper.

Cook corn in large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, about 8 minutes. Using tongs, remove corn from cooking liquid. Place on plate; reserve 1/2 cup corn cooking liquid. Cut corn kernels from cobs and reserve 4 cups (save remaining corn for another use).

Preheat oven to 177°C. Combine oil, lemon, crushed garlic, and rosemary in medium ovenproof pot. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of pot; heat oil to 66°C. Carefully lower swordfish into oil. Transfer pot to oven; poach fish uncovered until just firm to touch, about 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add guanciale; sauté until almost crisp, 2 to 3 minutes. Add minced garlic and shallot; sauté until soft but not brown, about 3 minutes. Stir in reserved 4 cups corn and crushed red pepper. Add butter and 2 tablespoons reserved corn cooking liquid; stir until mixture is moist and creamy, adding more cooking liquid by tablespoonfuls if dry, about 5 minutes. Stir in chives and thyme. Season with sea salt and pepper.
Divide corn among 4 shallow bowls. Top each with swordfish steak. Sprinkle with sea salt; drizzle with chive oil.

old-mans-turkey-noodle-soup.name: Old Man's Turkey Noodle Soup
instructions: Place turkey drumsticks and water in a large soup pot and bring to a boil. Stir in onions, carrots, celery, garlic, salt, black pepper, sage, thyme, rosemary, and celery salt; reduce heat to a simmer. Cook until turkey meat is very tender, about 2 hours.
Remove drumsticks and allow to cool enough to handle. Remove meat from bones and tendons, chop meat, and return to soup. Discard bones.
Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil. Cook egg noodles in boiling water until tender yet firm to the bite, about 5 minutes. Drain.
Divide noodles among soup bowls and ladle turkey soup on top.

old-fashioned-baits-teleculinaria.name: Old-fashioned Baits
instructions: Place the baits in a bowl and season them with salt, pepper, chopped garlic, laurel leaves and vinegar. Let her marinate for a few hours or even overnight.
Heat a frying pan with a thread of olive oil. Collect the baits and let fry on both sides. Remove and reserve.
In the same frying pan, pour another strand of olive oil and add the marinade coada and the onions cut into thin slices. Let it saute until the onion is very soft.
Sirva as iscas com a cebolada por cima, acompanhe com batatas cozidas e polvilhe tudo com salsa picada.

old-fashioned-chicken-rice-teleculinaria.name: Old-fashioned Chicken Rice
instructions: Bring a pot of oil to the fire and let it warm. Add the pieces of chicken, onion and chopped garlic teeth, laminated garlic and tomatoes, previously naked and chopped. Shake and let it saute.
Then add the sausages, the blond and thyme branch and season with salt and pepper. Cover with the water and let it cook, in mild heat, until the chicken gets tender.

Remove the pot from the fire, cut the sausages into circles and lie back in the pot. Take it back to the fire and let it boil. Retrieve the salt and pepper and add the rice. Stir and let it cook in a light. Transfer to a serving plate and sprinkle with chopped coriander.

olive-paste-argiro.name: Olive Paste
instructions: To make the olive paste, put the olives, anchovies and capers first in the blender and paste all the ingredients together.
Add the oil, lemon juice, salt and freshly ground pepper.
Mix and keep the pate in a closed jar in the refrigerator.
Enjoy the olive paste with toasted bread, bread, or sprinkle it on sandwiches.

one-pot-broccoli-mac-and-cheese.name: One-pot Broccoli Mac And Cheese

ingredients.item: . lumache (snail shells) or other medium shell pasta
-lb. bag or two 10–12.6-oz. bags frozen broccoli florets
Plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Toss together 12 oz. Monterey Jack, coarsely grated (about 3 cups), and 12 oz. sharp cheddar, coarsely grated (about 3 cups), in a large bowl with your hands. Sprinkle 2 Tbsp. cornstarch over and toss again until cheese is evenly coated. Set cheese mixture aside.

Bring 5 cups water to a boil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot. Add 1 lb. lumache (snail shells) or other medium shell pasta and cook, stirring often to keep pasta from sticking to bottom of pot, until about half of the water has been absorbed and pasta is very al dente, 7–9 minutes for most pasta shapes (about 3 minutes less than package directions).

Add one 1-lb. bag or two 10–12.6-oz. bags frozen broccoli florets and 2½ cups whole milk to pot and return to a boil. Cook, stirring often, until pasta and broccoli are both tender but not mushy, 2–3 minutes. (Taste a piece of pasta to check.)

Reduce heat to low and mix in 1 tsp. English mustard powder, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2¼ tsp. Morton Kosher salt, and 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Add reserved cheese mixture a handful at a time, stirring after each addition until mostly melted before adding more.

Remove pot from heat. Taste broccoli mac and cheese and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Let sit, stirring occasionally, until cheese sauce has thickened slightly before serving, 5–10 minutes.

one-pot-kimchi-and-squash-mac-and-cheese.name: One-pot Kimchi And Squash Mac And Cheese

ingredients.prep: shells, cavatappi, rigatoni, or other short pasta

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Peel ½ small butternut squash (about 1¼ lb.) and cut flesh into ½" cubes. Peel and finely chop 1 onion. Using the flat side of your chef’s knife, crush 1 garlic clove, then peel and finely chop. Coarsely chop 1 cup kimchi (some kimchi juice is okay; no need to drain).

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until softened slightly, about 2 minutes. Add garlic and kimchi and cook until kimchi is starting to brown and stick to bottom of pot, about 5 minutes.
Add squash to pot and reduce heat to medium. Cover and cook, stirring halfway through, until squash is tender (a paring knife should pierce flesh easily), 6–8 minutes.

Remove lid and stir in 1 lb. elbow macaroni, shells, cavatappi, rigatoni, or other short pasta, along with 4 cups vegetable stock or water. If using water, add 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt (if you broth isn't very flavorful, you may want to add a bit of salt too; start with 1/2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1/4 tsp. Morton kosher salt). Cover and bring to a simmer; cook until pasta is al dente and most of stock is absorbed (you want some starchy liquid left in pan), 6–8 minutes.
Meanwhile, grate 1 lb. sharp cheddar on the large holes of a box grater. Trim and finely slice 4 scallions.
Reduce heat to low and add cheese to pot; stir until cheese is melted and gooey, about 2 minutes. Season mac and cheese with a few grinds of freshly ground black pepper and scatter scallions over.

onion-marmalade.name: Onion Marmalade
instructions: Heat oil in heavy medium saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until beginning to soften (do not brown), stirring frequently, about 8 minutes. Add 1/2 cup water, sugar, cranberries, and mustard seeds. Cook until almost all liquid is absorbed, stirring often, about 8 minutes. Add vinegar and simmer until marmalade is thick, stirring often, 7 to 8 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Cool. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

onion-tuna-with-potatoes-teleculinaria.name: Onion Tuna With Potatoes
instructions: Tempere os bifes de atum com os dentes de alho picados, sal e pimenta. Descasque as cebolas e corte-as em rodelas. Lave as batatas e corte-as ao meio.
Cook the potatoes in water seasoned with salt, drain, let it love and remove the skin.
Heat a frying pan with olive oil, add the tuna steaks and let it blush on both sides. Remove from the skillet and book on a plate.
Deite a cebola na frigideira e deixe alourar. Retire e disponha sobre o atum. Sirva acompanhado das batatas cozidas, polvilhando tudo com salsa picada.
Tempere os bifes de atum com os dentes de alho picados, sal e pimenta. Descasque as cebolas e corte-as em rodelas. Lave as batatas e corte-as ao meio.
Cook the potatoes in water seasoned with salt, drain, let it love and remove the skin.
Heat a frying pan with olive oil, add the tuna steaks and let it blush on both sides. Remove from the skillet and book on a plate.
Deite a cebola na frigideira e deixe alourar. Retire e disponha sobre o atum. Sirva acompanhado das batatas cozidas, polvilhando tudo com salsa picada.

orange-brigadiers-teleculinaria.name: Orange Brigadiers

ingredients.item: Corante alimentar cor de laranja q.b.
Bolinhas prateadas e/ou douradas para decorar

instructions: Prepare the mass of the brigadiers overnight, so it'll be easier to mold them.

Take the condensed milk with the orange shaving, sifted moreena flour, juice and butter. Move until the preparation starts to take off from the pot. Remove, let it cool down and take it to the refrigerator or freezer until it gets hard.

Mold small balls with the previous preparation and place them in a light container, sprinkled with powdered sugar or greased with oil. In a deep dish, pour one or two drops of dye until you get the desired orange color. Add extrafine sugar and mix well.

Pass the brigadiers through the orange sugar and put them inside the paper trays. Decorate the center of each one with a silver and/or golden ball and take it to the fridge to dry a little. Serve them cold.

orange-fish-in-parchment.name: Orange Fish In Parchment

ingredients.item: Indian green chile or serrano chile
Cooked white rice and lime wedges

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 450°. Mix garlic, chile, ginger, oil, and turmeric in a small bowl to make a paste. Place fish on a paper towel and pat dry. Season all over with salt. Using half of the paste, coat 1 side of each fillet. Place a 2-foot sheet of parchment paper on work surface. Arrange fillets, paste side down, on half of parchment; coat top sides with remaining paste, making sure to evenly cover the entire surface. Top fillets with finely chopped clementine peel and fold other half of parchment up and over fish. Fold each open side over three times to seal parchment and make a pouch. Chill 30 minutes.

Transfer pouch to a rimmed baking sheet and bake 10–12 minutes. Turn off oven and let fish sit in oven 1 minute longer—the pouch should have puffed up at this point. Remove from oven, let pouch cool 1 minute, then open (be careful of the hot steam inside!).
Transfer fillets to plates and spoon juices from pouch over. Serve with rice and lime wedges for squeezing over.

orange-polenta-cake-with-vanilla-scented.name: Orange Polenta Cake With Vanilla-scented Plums And Blackberries And Buttermilk Ice Cream
instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Butter 9x5x3-inch metal loaf pan. Dust pan with flour; tap out excess. Whisk 1 1/4 cups flour, polenta, baking powder, and salt in medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat sugar, butter, and orange peel in large bowl until fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla. Add flour mixture in 3 additions alternately with yogurt in 2 additions, beating just until blended after each addition. Spread batter evenly in pan.

Bake cake until golden and tester inserted into center comes out clean, 50 to 55 minutes. Transfer to rack; cool in pan 15 minutes. Run knife around cake edges to loosen. Invert cake onto rack, then invert again on rack (top side up). Cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap in plastic and store at room temperature.
Cut cake crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick slices; serve with Vanilla-Scented Plums and Blackberries and Buttermilk Ice Cream.

orange-queijadas-and-delicious-recipe-te.name: Orange Queijadas - And Delicious Recipe
orange-queijadas-and-delicious-recipe-te.original_name: Queijadas de laranja- Receita Fácil e Deliciosa
instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Garnish small forms with butter and sprinkle them with sugar. Reserve.
Heat the milk with the butter. On the other hand, mix the sugar well with flour, eggs, shaving and orange juice. Add the warm milk, wrap and distribute the prepared in the forms.
Place the shapes on a hot water tray and put them in the oven for 35 minutes. Take it off, let it cool down and unshape it.

orange-revani-recipe-lezzet.name: Orange Revani Recipe

ingredients.item: Half cup freshly squeezed orange suy  u
Several drops of lemon suy  u

instructions: 1. Take the water and sugar pot of the water and sugar.
2. After boiling, add lemon juice, let it boil for 10 minutes and cool.
3. Egg and sugar foam mole be sugar.
4. Add and mix yogurt, liquid oil, orange juice and orange peel.
5. Get a homogeneous mixture by adding ammic, flour, baking powder and vanilla.
6. Pour mixture of oiled oven container.
7. Ö Bake for about 30 minutes in the oven heated from 180 degrees.
8. From the oven hot revaniye cold harvest.
9. Listen to and serve you with slice.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

orange-mango-and-ginger-sorbet.name: Orange, Mango, And Ginger Sorbet
instructions: Combine the water, sugar, ginger, salt, and lime zest in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer 5 minutes. Allow mixture to cool; strain. Stir in the orange juice, mango juice, and lemon juice. Cover and chill 3 hours.
Fill an ice cream maker with the mixture, and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.

oreo-cake-recipe-comedera.name: Oreo Cake Recipe

ingredients.item: 150 gr de galletas oreo ((sin la crema))
Crema del relleno de oreo ((la que reservaste de las galletas anteriores))

instructions: Start your recipe, separating the cookie and the cream from the oar. For the base only 150 grams of the cookie are required. You have to put the cream back.
Once you have the cookies, get them and get them as spray. Can do this with a blender or processor or manually with a roller.
Preheat your oven at 180 ° C
In a mixer, add the three eggs, salt and sugar and bate till everything's integrated and you have a creamy mix and increase its volume.
Ahora, a una velocidad media, vierte de a poco el aceite de oliva. Es decir en forma de hilo, mezcla hasta que se integre.
Termina de mezclar y desmonta tu bol de la batidora. Ahora, agrega las galletas trituradas y la levadura en polvo.
With the help of a spatula, mix with wrapped movements till integrated.
Fold up four small mold and at each you'll pour some of these biscuits. The idea is we have some prints. Also you can bake it in a single mold and when cold, cut it into plates of equal sizes.
Hornea durante 25- 30 minutos. Hasta que al pinchar en el centro del bizcocho el palillo salga limpio.
Hornea, retira del horno, deja enfriar, desmolda y reserva.

overeaters-tonic.name: Overeater's Tonic
instructions: Muddle mint sprigs, turmeric, ginger, fennel seeds, and cayenne in a 4-cup measuring glass until turmeric and ginger are broken up into bits.
Add vinegar, honey, bitters, and 3 cups cold water; stir to dissolve honey. Chill until very cold, at least 1 hour and up to 1 day. Strain.
